metadata.title:
WHAT WILL THE


CITY COUNCIL DO?

pages.raw_text:
Three big propositions are to come
up before the city council tonight
the water question, the purchase of
fire steamers and the franchise over
the new Hangman creek bridge.


Engineer Tannatt is expected to
make his proposition to the special
committee this afternoon in order TO
place 1t before the city council. Just
what the offer will be is still a Sc
cret.


When Councilmen Lindsey date of
the board of equalizatiOn) and Bald
win opposed the employment of En-
gineer Tannatt as constructing engi-
neer the fight by the Gill faction
started. 1t was held that City Engi-
neer Gill was the proper man to su-
pervise the construction of the pro-
posed reservoir From political
standpoint it was necessary that Gill
have control.


The city engineer and his friends
won the first fight and the offer of
Engineer Tannatt to go to work for
the city at $3.50 month was turned
down.


Then came the proposition to have
Mr.. Tannatt pass on the plans for the
new reservoir and assist in bringing
